scripts.snapshot: sh -c '[ -x .venv/bin/python ] && exec .venv/bin/python scripts/build_snapshot.py || exec python3 scripts/build_snapshot.py'
scripts.backtest:rank: sh -c '[ -x .venv/bin/python ] && exec .venv/bin/python -m scripts.backtest.rank_all || exec python3 -m scripts.backtest.rank_all'
scripts.backtest:optimize: sh -c '[ -x .venv/bin/python ] && exec .venv/bin/python -m scripts.backtest.optimize || exec python3 -m scripts.backtest.optimize'
